attributes.action: Call general election amid collapse in public confidence in PM & Government
attributes.additional_details: Public confidence in the Prime Minister has significantly declined due to ongoing political instability, internal division, and lack of clear leadership. At a time of major economic and social challenges, the UK needs stable leadership with public consent. A General Election is the appropriate democratic mechanism to restore trust and legitimacy.
attributes.background: We ask the Government to call an immediate General Election so the public can decide whether the current Prime Minister and Government still have a democratic mandate to govern.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
